requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — Household Refrigerating Appliances (INMETRO compulsory certification + ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——家用制冷器具（INMETRO强制认证 + ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——家用製冷器具（INMETRO強制認證 + ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances (refrigerators, freezers, refrigerator-freezer combinations, wine coolers, ice-cream appliances) placed on the Brazilian market must comply with INMETRO compulsory certification for electrical safety. The specific Brazilian standard is ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Part 2-24: Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers), read in conjunction with the general standard ABNT NBR IEC 60335-1. Key requirements cover: protection against electric shock; insulation resistance and dielectric strength; thermal cut-outs; creepage and clearance distances; mechanical strength of housing; earthing continuity; and appliance markings. Unlike the EU manufacturer self-declaration route, Brazilian conformity is established through third-party certification by an INMETRO-accredited certification body (OCP), including type testing in an accredited laboratory, factory inspection, and ongoing surveillance; the INMETRO conformity mark is applied before market placement, and the certificate is held by a Brazil-resident entity (CNPJ). Testing must reflect Brazilian supply conditions (127/220 V, 60 Hz).
summary.zh: 投放巴西市场的家用制冷器具（电冰箱、冷冻箱、冰箱-冷冻箱组合、酒柜、冰淇淋器具）须符合INMETRO关于电气安全的强制认证。适用的巴西专项标准为ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24（家用和类似用途电器的安全——第2-24部分：制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求），须与通用标准ABNT NBR IEC 60335-1结合使用。核心要求涵盖：防触电保护；绝缘电阻与介电强度；热断路器；爬电距离与电气间隙；外壳机械强度；接地连续性；及器具标识。与欧盟制造商自我声明路径不同，巴西的合格评定须由INMETRO认可的认证机构（OCP）进行第三方认证，包括在认可实验室进行型式试验、工厂检查及持续监督；INMETRO合格标志须在投放市场前加贴，且证书须由巴西境内实体（CNPJ）持有。试验须反映巴西供电条件（127/220 V，60 Hz）。
summary.zht: 投放巴西市場的家用製冷器具（電冰箱、冷凍箱、冰箱-冷凍箱組合、酒櫃、冰淇淋器具）須符合INMETRO關於電氣安全的強制認證。適用的巴西專項標準為ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24（家用和類似用途電器的安全——第2-24部分：製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求），須與通用標準ABNT NBR IEC 60335-1結合使用。核心要求涵蓋：防觸電保護；絕緣電阻與介電強度；熱斷路器；爬電距離與電氣間隙；外殼機械強度；接地連續性；及器具標識。與歐盟製造商自我聲明路徑不同，巴西的合格評定須由INMETRO認可的認證機構（OCP）進行第三方認證，包括在認可實驗室進行型式試驗、工廠檢查及持續監督；INMETRO合格標誌須在投放市場前加貼，且證書須由巴西境內實體（CNPJ）持有。試驗須反映巴西供電條件（127/220 V，60 Hz）。

standards_or_laws: INMETRO compulsory conformity assessment for electrical safety — administered via INMETRO Portarias (Ordinances)

ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Part 2-24: Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (Brazilian adoption of IEC 60335-2-24)
ABNT NBR IEC 60335-1 — General requirements (read in conjunction with Part 2-24)

summary.en: China's mandatory safety standard for household refrigerating appliances is GB 4706.13-2014 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers), which is technically derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 but incorporates Chinese national deviations. GB 4706.13-2014 is mandatory (GB) and enforced by SAMR under the China Compulsory Certification (CCC) regime. Products must be CCC-certified by a CNCA-designated certification body before sale in China. CCC test reports issued by Chinese laboratories against GB 4706.13 are NOT accepted as equivalent evidence under the Brazilian INMETRO conformity assessment pathway.
summary.zh: 中国家用制冷器具的强制性安全标准为GB 4706.13-2014（家用和类似用途电器的安全——制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求），该标准技术上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010，但包含中国国家偏差。GB 4706.13-2014为强制性国家标准（GB），由市场监管总局（SAMR）通过中国强制认证（CCC）制度监督执行。产品须经CNCA指定认证机构完成CCC认证方可在中国销售。中国实验室依据GB 4706.13出具的CCC检测报告不被巴西INMETRO合格评定路径接受为等效证据。
summary.zht: 中國家用製冷器具的強制性安全標準為GB 4706.13-2014（家用和類似用途電器的安全——製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求），該標準技術上源自IEC 60335-2-24:2010，但包含中國國家偏差。GB 4706.13-2014為強制性國家標準（GB），由市場監管總局（SAMR）通過中國強制認證（CCC）制度監督執行。產品須經CNCA指定認證機構完成CCC認證方可在中國銷售。中國實驗室依據GB 4706.13出具的CCC檢測報告不被巴西INMETRO合格評定路徑接受為等效證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (mandatory; derived from IEC 60335-2-24:2010 with national deviations; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB 4706.1-2005 — General requirements (read in conjunction with GB 4706.13)

gap.en: Because both GB 4706.13-2014 and ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24 derive from IEC 60335-2-24, the base technical content is broadly aligned, but the conformity route and deviations differ: (1) Third-party certification — Brazil requires certification by an INMETRO-accredited OCP with type testing in an accredited (or ILAC MRA-accepted) laboratory, factory inspection, and ongoing surveillance; manufacturer self-declaration is not permitted. CCC type-test reports cannot be re-used without OCP acceptance and re-issuance of an INMETRO certificate; IECEE CB Scheme reports (IEC 60335-2-24 basis) may reduce re-testing scope if they cover Brazilian national deviations — verify with the OCP. (2) National deviations and supply conditions — GB 4706.13 deviations (socket/plug types, earthing arrangements, test conditions) and China's 220 V, 50 Hz differ from Brazil's 127/220 V, 60 Hz; data must be reconciled to Brazilian conditions. (3) Documentation — INMETRO certificate held by a CNPJ entity, the INMETRO conformity mark on the appliance, technical file, and Portuguese-language instructions for the Brazilian market.
gap.zh: 由于GB 4706.13-2014与ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24均源自IEC 60335-2-24，基础技术内容大体一致，但合格评定路径及偏差不同：（1）第三方认证——巴西要求由INMETRO认可的OCP进行认证，须在认可（或ILAC MRA接受）实验室进行型式试验、工厂检查及持续监督；不允许制造商自我声明。CCC型式试验报告未经OCP接受并重新签发INMETRO证书不能复用；IECEE CB体系报告（基于IEC 60335-2-24）如涵盖巴西国家偏差，则可缩减重新检测范围——须与OCP核实。（2）国家偏差与供电条件——GB 4706.13的偏差（插座/插头类型、接地方式、试验条件）及中国220 V、50 Hz与巴西127/220 V、60 Hz不同；数据须按巴西条件核对。（3）文件——由CNPJ实体持有的INMETRO证书、器具上的INMETRO合格标志、技术文件及面向巴西市场的葡萄牙语使用说明书。
gap.zht: 由於GB 4706.13-2014與ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24均源自IEC 60335-2-24，基礎技術內容大體一致，但合格評定路徑及偏差不同：（1）第三方認證——巴西要求由INMETRO認可的OCP進行認證，須在認可（或ILAC MRA接受）實驗室進行型式試驗、工廠檢查及持續監督；不允許製造商自我聲明。CCC型式試驗報告未經OCP接受並重新簽發INMETRO證書不能複用；IECEE CB體系報告（基於IEC 60335-2-24）如涵蓋巴西國家偏差，則可縮減重新檢測範圍——須與OCP核實。（2）國家偏差與供電條件——GB 4706.13的偏差（插座/插頭類型、接地方式、試驗條件）及中國220 V、50 Hz與巴西127/220 V、60 Hz不同；數據須按巴西條件核對。（3）文件——由CNPJ實體持有的INMETRO證書、器具上的INMETRO合格標誌、技術文件及面向巴西市場的葡萄牙語使用說明書。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — INMETRO compulsory certification required before market placement; ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24 (with ABNT NBR IEC 60335-1) is the applicable safety standard; certification is third-party (accredited OCP) with the certificate held by a Brazil-resident (CNPJ) entity
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required under GB 4706.13-2014 before sale in China; administered by SAMR/CNCA

source.publisher: INMETRO — Instituto Nacional de Metrologia, Qualidade e Tecnologia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] INMETRO compulsory certification for electrical safety is mandatory for household refrigerating appliances. ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24 (with ABNT NBR IEC 60335-1) is the applicable safety standard. Chinese CCC certification to GB 4706.13 does not satisfy the Brazilian conformity pathway; certification through an INMETRO-accredited OCP — with type testing, factory inspection, a CNPJ certificate holder, and reconciliation to 127/220 V, 60 Hz conditions — is required. IECEE CB Scheme reports may partially reduce re-testing scope; verify with the OCP.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 家用制冷器具须强制取得INMETRO电气安全认证。ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24（配合ABNT NBR IEC 60335-1）为适用的安全标准。中国依据GB 4706.13取得的CCC认证不满足巴西合格评定路径；须通过INMETRO认可的OCP认证——含型式试验、工厂检查、CNPJ证书持有人，并按127/220 V、60 Hz条件核对。IECEE CB体系报告或可部分缩减重新检测范围；请与OCP核实。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 家用製冷器具須強制取得INMETRO電氣安全認證。ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24（配合ABNT NBR IEC 60335-1）為適用的安全標準。中國依據GB 4706.13取得的CCC認證不滿足巴西合格評定路徑；須通過INMETRO認可的OCP認證——含型式試驗、工廠檢查、CNPJ證書持有人，並按127/220 V、60 Hz條件核對。IECEE CB體系報告或可部分縮減重新檢測範圍；請與OCP核實。
